high_confidence_mistakes.title: MONTHLY ASIA CHICKEN WRAP: Japanese boneless leg shortage deepens in Feb as Brazil, Thailand falter

CFR North Asia chicken leg prices climbed from $2,945/metric ton Jan. 27 to $3,125/mt Feb. 27, reflecting a 6% month-over-month increase, according to price assessment data from Platts, part of S&P Global Energy. Japan: Persistent shortages, high prices
high_confidence_mistakes.expected_rationale: Deepening shortage implies tighter chicken pricing.
